description_long: This is a multi-strand necklace composed of numerous small, round, light blue beads intricately woven together to form a layered, textured appearance. The strands are arranged in a graduated fashion, with the innermost strand sitting higher on the neck and the outermost strand draping lower, creating a cascading effect. The beads appear to be uniformly sized and are likely made of glass or plastic, giving the necklace a lightweight and delicate feel. The necklace is fastened at the back with a simple clasp, and the overall design is symmetrical and elegant. The color is a soft pastel blue, which gives the piece a fresh and modern look. The style is minimalist yet visually interesting due to the multiple strands and beadwork.
description: A multi-strand light blue beaded necklace with a cascading, layered design and a minimalist, modern aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full layered arrangement of light blue beads, highlighting the cascading effect and symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the thickness of the beadwork and the way the strands curve around the neck, as well as the clasp area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the closure and the way the strands come together at the back, showing the necklace's fastening mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the layered beadwork and the connection of strands at the clasp.
